title: [FIRRTL] Assertion type `trueOrIsX` looks like it has some problems

features.name: procedural assertion with x-propagation check
features.description: Code should include a procedural assertion using x-propagation check with reduction operator and explicit x comparison

features.name: nested when conditions with trueOrIsX assertion
features.description: Code should include nested when/if conditions combined with assertion that checks for x values
features.snippet:
wire _GEN = b & a;
if (_GEN && ~(^_GEN === 1'bx)) begin $error("msg"); end

features.name: reduction operator x-detection in condition
features.description: Code should include a reduction operator XOR applied to a condition followed by comparison to 1'bx

features.name: logical AND of conditions with x-propagation
features.description: Code should include logical AND of multiple conditions where x-propagation is checked on the combined expression
